problem id: eea91b82
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(6) AND NOT SHR(5)) XOR NOT SHL(3)

examples:
  10110011 -> 10001111
  11000010 -> 01011111
  00001101 -> 11010100
  10010000 -> 01011111
  00101001 -> 11111101
  10000100 -> 11111110
  00111010 -> 10100001
  00000000 -> 11111111
  10100000 -> 11010111
  11000001 -> 10000111

query: 11110101
predicted answer: 00101111
